_comment: Routing cost weights. All values are MODELING ASSUMPTIONS. w_time, w_risk, w_uncertainty are dimensionless normalised weights that should sum roughly to 1-4 depending on operational priority.

safe_route._comment: Multiplier applied to w_risk when the operator enables safe-route mode (maximum risk aversion).

normalisation._comment: Reference time in seconds used to normalise travel cost to a dimensionless scale. A 1 km road at 10 km/h base speed = 360s = 1.0 unit.

bpr_congestion._comment: Bureau of Public Roads (BPR) function parameters: travel_time_factor = 1 + alpha * (flow/capacity)^beta. Standard values from US Highway Capacity Manual.

road_capacity_vehicles_per_hour._comment: Approximate per-lane capacity by OSM highway tag. Modeling approximation.
